title: Lian Heat Wave
lead: Lian is experiencing a critical heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.66. This event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The heat wave in Lian is causing temperatures to soar, with a CDD of 11.8 GG. 
 The humidity level is at 74%, making the heat feel even more oppressive. 
 The wind speed is relatively low at 6.9 km/h, which is not providing much relief from the heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
